task_description: Upgrade the PC blocker to professional/sellable quality: expand domain blocking to cover ALL harmful content and addictions (drugs, alcohol, self-harm, gambling, violence, piracy, dark web, dating), add AI chatbot assistant for recovery help and troubleshooting, rewrite scripts with proper error handling and professional UI, add menu-driven interface.

verification.summary: All features completed. 1118 domains across 10 categories. 7 batch scripts with error handling and logging. AI chatbot with API integration and offline mode. Review issues addressed: SHA256 password hashing, marker-based hosts cleanup, category-respecting vigilance task, localStorage API key storage, input size limit, harm-reduction sites removed from block list, registry comparison bug fixed, delayed expansion for counter display.
